ptzCameras.notes: 1/2.8-inch HD CMOS, 12x. HDMI+USB output. HFOV 72.5°/7.4° published by Fomako (View Angle). fomako.net/product/FOMAKO-HDMI-USB-FMK12UH.html. Current.

1/2.8-inch HD CMOS, 20x. HDMI+USB output. Distinct lens module from K20 (4.7–94mm vs 4.42–88.5mm). HFOV 58.7°/3.2° published by Fomako (View Angle). fomako.net/product/FOMAKO-HDMI-USB-FMK20UH.html. Current.
1080p 60fps, 1/2.8-inch CMOS 2.07MP, 20x. HFOV 60.7°/3.36° published by Fomako (labeled H). Focal range 4.42–88.5mm. fomako.net/product/fomako-k20-camera-1080p-60fps-20x-optical-zoom.html. Current.
1080p 60fps, 1/2.8-inch CMOS, 30x. HFOV 60.7°/2.28° published by Fomako. Focal range 4.42–132.6mm. fomako.net/product/fomako-k30-camera-1080p-60fps-30x-optical-zoom.html. Current.

4K, 1/2.8-inch Sony UHD CMOS 8.42MP, 30x. HFOV and DFOV explicitly separated on product page (H: 58.1°/2.14°, D: 65.4°/2.48°); HFOV used. Focal range 5.2–148.4mm; published zoom 30x (focal ratio ≈28.5x). Industry-standard 5.14mm sensor width does not back-calculate to match published HFOV; manufacturer active area is wider — HFOV authoritative. fomako.net/product/fomako-k30ns-4k-30x-hdmi-3gsdi-ndi-ptz-camera.html. Current.
4K 60fps, 1/2.8-inch CMOS, 20x. NDI|HX3. Same optical module as KN20A. HFOV 60.0°/3.5° published by Fomako. fomako.net/product/fomako-k600n-ndi-camera-4k-60fps-20x-optical-zoom.html. Current.

4K 60fps, 1/1.8-inch CMOS, 20x. HFOV 60.0°/3.5° published by Fomako (labeled H and V on product page). Focal range 6.25–125mm. fomako.net/product/FoMaKo-4K-PTZ-Camera-60FPS-20X-Optical-Zoom.html. Current.
Same optical module as K820; adds NDI|HX3. 4K 60fps, 1/1.8-inch CMOS, 20x. HFOV 60.0°/3.5° published by Fomako. fomako.net/product/FoMaKo-4K-NDI-Camera-60FPS-20X-Optical-Zoom.html. Current.
Same optical module as K20; adds NDI|HX3. 1080p, 1/2.8-inch CMOS, 20x. HFOV 60.7°/3.36° published by Fomako. fomako.net/product/fomako-kn20-ndi-camera-1080p-60fps-20x-optical-zoom.html. Current.

1/2.8-inch CMOS (IMX415), 20x. NDI 6 & HX3 Pro series. Different lens module from KN20 (5.1–94.5mm vs 4.42–88.5mm). HFOV 60.0°/3.5° published by Fomako. fomako.net/product/FOMAKO-KN20A-NDI-PTZ.html. Current.
Same optical module as K30; adds NDI|HX3. 1080p, 1/2.8-inch CMOS, 30x. HFOV 60.7°/2.28° published by Fomako. fomako.net/product/fomako-kn30-ndi-camera-1080p-60fps-30x-optical-zoom.html. Current.

1/2.8-inch CMOS, 30x. NDI 6 & HX3 Pro series. Same optical module as K30NS. HFOV 58.1°/2.14° published by Fomako (H values from H/D/V table). fomako.net/product/FOMAKO-KN30A-NDI-PTZ-Camera.html. Current.
